5.6 Typical Characteristics (continued)

at operating temperature $T_J = 25^\circ\text{C}$, $V_{\text{IN}} = V_{\text{OUT}}(\text{NOM}) + 0.5\text{V}$ or 1.45V (whichever is greater), $I_{\text{OUT}} = 1\text{mA}$, $V_{\text{EN}} = V_{\text{IN}}$, and $C_{\text{IN}} = C_{\text{OUT}} = 1\text{\muF}$ (unless otherwise noted)
